FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]

WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'

SELECT [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id], [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

SELECT [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id], [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

SELECT [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id], [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]

    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]

) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]

SELECT [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id], [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]

FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[TotalVoidAmount], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [o0].[VoidBy], [o0].[VoidByName], [o0].[VoidReason], [o0].[VoidTime], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[ArabicName], [m].[AttributeId], [m].[AttributePrice], [m].[BackColor], [m].[Barcode], [m].[BranchId], [m].[CategoryId] AS [CategoryId0], [m].[CreationDate], [m].[Description], [m].[EnglishName], [m].[FifthPrice], [m].[FourthPrice], [m].[HasAttribute], [m].[ImagePath], [m].[Invisible], [m].[KitchenTypeId], [m].[MainCategoryId], [m].[NormalizedEnglishName], [m].[Price], [m].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [m].[SecondPrice], [m].[Tax], [m].[TextColor], [m].[TextSize], [m].[ThirdPrice], [m].[UpdatedDate], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[ArabicName] AS [ArabicName0], [c].[BranchId] AS [BranchId0], [c].[CreationDate] AS [CreationDate0], [c].[EnglishName] AS [EnglishName0], [c].[Invisible] AS [Invisible0], [c].[ItemsFont], [c].[KitchenTypeId] AS [KitchenTypeId0], [c].[NormalizedEnglishName] AS [NormalizedEnglishName0], [c].[PrintInBackupReceipt] AS [PrintInBackupReceipt0], [c].[UpdateDate]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

SELECT [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id], [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]

) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

SELECT [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id], [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]

WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'

FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'

SELECT [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id], [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
